title: Tiam Anti-Blemish Body Lotion 200ml
content_html:
Body skin gets neglected in most routines — and in Bangladesh's heat and humidity, that neglect shows up as rough patches, bumpy texture on the upper arms and thighs, and dark marks that linger for months after mosquito bites or friction. The Tiam Anti-Blemish Body Lotion is a Korean body lotion built specifically for these concerns, combining chemical exfoliation with calming hydration in a formula light enough to wear comfortably through a Dhaka summer.

What makes the Tiam Anti-Blemish Body Lotion different

Most body lotions only moisturise. The Tiam Anti-Blemish Body Lotion adds AHA and BHA — the same exfoliating acids used in facial serums — to gently dissolve dead skin cells sitting on the surface and clear congested pores underneath. AHA (glycolic and lactic acid types) works on the top layer, smoothing rough texture and helping fade the appearance of dark marks and uneven tone. BHA (salicylic acid) goes deeper into pores to help keep body breakouts and keratosis pilaris bumps under control. Together, they give body skin the kind of active-ingredient attention that faces have been getting for years.

Calamine rounds out the formula, bringing a soothing, slightly cooling quality that offsets any potential sensitivity from the acids. This is particularly welcome on irritated or heat-rash-prone body skin during Bangladesh's long, humid months. The lotion absorbs without the heavy, sticky finish that makes most body products unbearable in warm weather.

Who benefits most

  • Anyone dealing with keratosis pilaris — the small rough bumps common on upper arms, thighs, and buttocks
  • Body skin prone to post-inflammatory dark marks from bites, ingrowns, or friction
  • Rough, uneven texture on elbows, knees, and legs
  • Body acne or back/chest breakouts driven by sweat and humidity

The Tiam Anti-Blemish Body Lotion is suitable for most skin types. Very dry skin may want a richer moisturiser layered over it on the driest areas, while highly sensitive skin should patch test on a small area first, since the AHA/BHA actives can cause mild tingling on first use.

How to use it

  1. Apply the Tiam Anti-Blemish Body Lotion to clean, dry body skin after showering — damp skin can increase sensitivity to the acids
  2. Focus on problem areas: upper arms, thighs, back, chest, elbows, knees
  3. Use once daily, ideally in the evening, building up to twice daily as tolerated
  4. Follow with sunscreen on any exposed treated areas in the morning — AHA increases sun sensitivity, and Bangladesh's strong UV makes this non-negotiable

What to expect over time

Like all chemical exfoliation, the Tiam Anti-Blemish Body Lotion works gradually. Smoother texture is usually noticeable within a couple of weeks; fading of dark marks and evening of tone takes longer — four to six weeks of consistent use alongside sun protection. The lightweight, non-greasy formula makes daily consistency genuinely easy to maintain, even in Bangladesh's hottest months, which is exactly what body skin needs to see real change.

title: Simple Replenishing Rich Moisturiser 125ml
content_html:
Sometimes what skin needs most is the simplest thing done well. The Simple Replenishing Rich Moisturiser is a no-fuss, fragrance-free moisturiser from the UK that does exactly one job — deeply hydrate and replenish dry, depleted skin — and does it reliably, day after day. In a market flooded with multi-step routines and active-heavy formulas, this moisturiser is a quiet essential for anyone whose skin barrier needs rest, repair, and consistent hydration.

What is in it — and what is deliberately left out

The Simple Replenishing Rich Moisturiser is built on a short, gentle ingredient list. Glycerin draws water into the skin and holds it there. Panthenol (vitamin B5) supports the skin's natural repair process and helps lock in moisture. Borage seed oil, rich in gamma-linolenic acid (an omega-6 fatty acid), nourishes and softens skin that feels rough or tight. What the formula deliberately excludes matters just as much: no fragrance, no artificial colour, no harsh chemicals, no alcohol. Every ingredient is chosen to be kind to sensitive and reactive skin — which is exactly why dermatologists and skincare professionals recommend the Simple range so consistently.

Who it is made for

  • Dry skin that feels tight, flaky, or rough — the rich texture provides lasting moisture without needing constant reapplication
  • Sensitive or reactive skin that cannot tolerate fragrance, essential oils, or strong actives — this formula is as gentle as moisturisers get
  • Skin recovering from over-exfoliation, retinol irritation, or barrier damage — a plain, nourishing moisturiser is often the best thing to reach for during recovery
  • Anyone looking for a reliable, affordable daily moisturiser that layers well under sunscreen and makeup

Oily skin may find the rich texture too heavy for daytime use in Bangladesh's humidity, but it works well as a night cream for combination skin that gets dry patches.

How to use it

  1. Apply the Simple Replenishing Rich Moisturiser to clean skin after toner and any water-based serums
  2. A pea-sized amount covers the face and neck — warm it between your fingertips before pressing gently into the skin
  3. Use morning and night; in the morning, follow with sunscreen
  4. During Bangladesh's cooler, drier months (November through February), it can be layered more generously or used over a hydrating serum for extra nourishment
  5. In the humid months, use a thinner layer or switch to night-only use if it feels too heavy during the day

Why basic moisturisation matters

A good moisturiser is the foundation every other product in a routine depends on. Serums, actives, and sunscreens all perform better on skin that is properly hydrated and has an intact barrier. The Simple Replenishing Rich Moisturiser is not glamorous or trend-driven — it is a dependable, well-made moisturiser that does its job without irritation, without fragrance, and without unnecessary complexity. For skin that just needs to be nourished and left alone, that is exactly what effective skincare looks like.

title: MediPeel Bio Intense Glutathione White Cream 50g
content_html:
Glutathione has become one of the most sought-after brightening ingredients in Asian skincare, valued for its antioxidant properties and its role in supporting a more even, luminous complexion. The MediPeel Bio Intense Glutathione White Cream puts this ingredient at the centre of a rich, concentrated night cream format — designed for skin that looks dull, uneven, or marked by dark spots and wants a dedicated brightening step in the PM routine.

How glutathione works in skincare

Glutathione is a naturally occurring antioxidant in the body that plays a role in protecting cells from oxidative stress. In topical skincare like the MediPeel Bio Intense Glutathione White Cream, it works to support a brighter, more even-looking skin tone by helping reduce the visible appearance of dullness and dark spots over time. It pairs well with other brightening allies like niacinamide and hyaluronic acid, both present in this formula — niacinamide helps refine the look of pores and uneven tone, while hyaluronic acid provides deep hydration that plumps the skin and gives it a healthier, more luminous appearance.

The cream has a rich, dense texture that feels substantial on the skin — this is intentional, as it is designed primarily as a night cream that works while you sleep, when the skin is in its natural recovery phase. It is not a lightweight day moisturiser and should not be used as one, especially in Bangladesh's humidity.

Who should consider it

  • Skin showing dullness, uneven tone, and dark spots — particularly sun-related or post-inflammatory marks common in South Asian skin
  • Mature skin wanting a richer, more nourishing night cream with brightening benefits
  • Dry to normal skin types — the rich texture delivers deep moisture overnight
  • Anyone looking to add a glutathione-based product to their existing brightening routine

Oily and acne-prone skin types should use this sparingly or as a targeted treatment rather than an all-over cream, as the dense texture may feel too heavy for oil-prone areas. Patch test first if your skin is sensitive.

How to use it

  1. Use the MediPeel Bio Intense Glutathione White Cream as the last step of your evening routine, after cleansing, toner, and any serums
  2. Take a small amount — a little goes a long way with this concentration
  3. Press gently into the face and neck, focusing on areas of uneven tone or dark spots
  4. Allow it to absorb fully before sleeping — avoid applying too thickly, which can cause pilling
  5. In the morning, always follow your routine with sunscreen — brightening ingredients only hold their progress when skin is protected from UV

Setting realistic expectations

Brightening and evening skin tone is a slow, cumulative process that depends on consistent daily use and — critically — daily sunscreen. The MediPeel Bio Intense Glutathione White Cream is a well-formulated tool in that process, not an overnight transformation. Used steadily as part of a complete routine that includes sun protection, it supports a gradual move toward skin that looks cleaner, brighter, and more even-toned.
